title: Wynnpack
body:
![Main one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5c6fb6add1c0c596146d91cc787ffb590778cd6.png)

## Another Wyncraft Modpack? Why would I use this one?
This modpack is avalible on the newest minecraft version 1.21. I added the best optymalization mods I've seen and Wynncraft support mods, to create your gameplay smoother. I think you'll enjoy it :D

## Features
- Better optimalization
- Greater view distance (Distant Horizons)
- Wynncraft Fan-made Mods (in-game map and more)
- In-game resourcepack and shaders downloader

## Question Section
> Q: I installed the modpack and I have to get something like "token", what now?

> A: That's the **voice acting** mod ([https://voicesofwynn.com/](https://voicesofwynn.com/)), to get the token, you have to pay them on the patreon. If you don't want to, just turn the mod off :)
